overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along a high-rise rooftop at night, overlooking the neon-lit Gotham City skyline with a prominent vertical 'GOTHAM' sign and gothic architecture under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop with industrial equipment overlooking city

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the rooftop edge with cape flowing, overlooking the city

entered.detail: tall vertical red neon sign spelling 'GOTHAM' mounted on a tower
gothic clock tower with illuminated face visible in the distance
city skyline with various illuminated buildings and neon signs
metal grid flooring of the rooftop with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a high-rise rooftop at night, with a prominent red 'GOTHAM' neon sign towering on the right and a gothic clock tower visible on the left. The city skyline stretches into the distance under dark stormy skies, with the rooftop's metal grating visible underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop with open city view

events.description: distant searchlight beam becomes visible sweeping across the skyline

agents.ego_description: Batman continuing to walk along the rooftop, moving past the GOTHAM sign

entered.detail: bright white searchlight beam sweeping across the distant buildings

segments.scene_description: As Batman continues walking, the GOTHAM sign passes out of view to the right, revealing more of the open city skyline. A bright searchlight beam becomes visible in the distance, sweeping across the gothic architecture while the character maintains a steady pace along the rooftop edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-rise rooftop that shifts from a focused view of iconic landmarks to a sweeping panorama of the stormy city skyline. It begins with Batman walking across metal grating, flanked by a towering red GOTHAM neon sign on the right and a gothic clock tower on the left. As he maintains a steady pace, the camera tracks forward and the neon sign gradually passes out of view to the right, opening the perspective to the vast urban expanse. The scene then expands to reveal a bright searchlight beam sweeping across distant gothic architecture under dark, turbulent skies before the shot settles on the wide, neon-lit horizon.
